S-dl-05.title: Invalid inputs produce distinct, actionable error types

1.expected: 4 distinct error types for 4 invalid inputs
1.actual: NVDAA → TickerNotFoundError, TSM → FilingNotFoundError (or TickerNotFoundError), NVDA FY1985 → FilingNotFoundError, AAPL 10-Q → UnsupportedFilingTypeError
Test false positive: Path.exists() returned True for lowercase 'nvda' on case-insensitive filesystem
1.details: Mounted volume from macOS host is case-insensitive; Path('data/sec_filings/nvda').exists() matches NVDA. Code is correct — no duplicate directory created.

2.actual: Ticker normalized to uppercase at pipeline and store level; os.listdir() confirms only 'NVDA' exists
2.details: Fixed test to use os.listdir() instead of Path.exists() for case-insensitive FS

S-dl-07-manual.title: Overlapping writes with real SEC calls

fixes.root_cause: Test false positive on case-insensitive filesystem. Path.exists() for lowercase 'nvda' returns True because the macOS-mounted volume is case-insensitive, treating 'nvda' and 'NVDA' as the same path. The production code correctly normalizes tickers to uppercase — no duplicate directory is ever created.
fixes.fix_description: Changed test to use os.listdir() to check actual directory names listed, rather than Path.exists() which cannot distinguish case-insensitive path resolution from actual duplicate directories.

tests_run.notes: 97 passed, 8 deselected (sec_integration). 3 converter tests fail due to html-to-markdown unavailable in container (env limitation, not code bug).
